subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who was attracted by the verses of God and turned towards His horizon when the people were in manifest rejection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن انجذب بایات الله و اقبل الی افقه اذ کان الناس فی اعراض مبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat]
